use_cases: Displaying comic-style headings or titles in creative applications
Creating playful headlines for marketing and promotional content
Adding cartoon-style text effects to meme generators or creative tools
Enhancing visual appeal of entertainment and media websites
Generating eye-catching call-to-action text with comic aesthetics
ai_summary: A comic-styled text component that renders bold, cartoon-like typography with thick black outlines, yellow polka-dot backgrounds, and red drop shadows. Features entrance animations with scale, opacity, and rotation effects using motion/react. The distinctive Bangers font with skew transformation and printed comic-book aesthetic makes it ideal for creative, playful, or entertainment-focused applications requiring eye-catching headlines.
